evidence: "Very good movie if you like the old style westerns."
"Old movies don't have all the garbage found in newer ones like vulgarity which doesn't add anything at all."
"Good movie, good story with an unexpected twist at the end."
"Slow moving at first, but became pretty interesting as it went on."
"Not an interesting movie and doesn't end, it just stops."
"Not a well made movie. Too much emphasis on making their moonshine and not enough on the action in the war."
"Nice to watch something that does not have all the 'modern garbage'"

summary: The user shows a strong preference for old westerns and clean movies, appreciating simple narratives with high production quality. They value emotional resonance and meaningful storytelling, while their pacing preference is mixed, indicating a tolerance for slower starts if the story becomes engaging.
